expectations.text: prism-locator agent is spawned to check for existing research/plans in .prism/
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'Simulated: Task(subagent_type="prism-locator") — Find existing research, plans, or work related to authentication'

expectations.text: Workflow selection logic is applied (R->P->I->V for unfamiliar work, or abbreviated if artifacts exist)
expectations.evidence: Step 1: 'Add a new authentication system is a new feature that requires understanding the existing codebase. Following the skill's guidance, this triggers the full R->P->I->V workflow.'

expectations.text: The correct phase skill is recommended or invoked based on findings
expectations.evidence: Step 3: 'No research or plan exists for a broader authentication system... Start with Research phase.' Then proceeds to /prism-research in Step 4.

expectations.text: If .prism/ directory does not exist, init_prism.py is suggested
